source: Sections 4, 5, and 6 include a set of common prerequisites for each section that SHALL be met prior to performing any test in that section. Additionally, each test case within a section may have prerequisites specific to that test that SHALL be met prior to performing the specific test. If there are no prerequisites required for a specific test case, this area states ‘None’ and the test begins with the Test Sequence criteria.
title: Prerequisites

source: The prerequisites for each test case SHALL be implemented in sequential order.
title: Prerequisites
